results.title: T20 WC: Brits' record ton helps SA crush Netherlands, keep semi-final hopes alive
results.description: Tazmin Brits' career-best 114 powered South Africa to a massive 208/1 against the Netherlands, securing an 88-run victory. This win keeps their Women's T20 World Cup semi-final hopes alive, placing them level with India in Group 1. Brits' century, the second-highest in World Cup history, and stellar bowling from Ayabonga Khaka and Shabnim Ismail were key. A crucial match against Bangladesh now awaits.
